shard_pattern: Megatron 1D (Pattern A; model axis only, batch replicated)
source: model-bringup-multichip VALIDATE_TP (--force-multichip; weight_fit transformer weight_predicted on n150+p150)

repair_history.reason: sdy.collective_permute not lowerable (tt-mlir #3370) from 2D batch+model reshard
reshape mismatch: 28 heads not divisible by 8; bf16 to fit 4-way (fp32 OOM #4780)

head_constraint: TP degree must divide num_attention_heads=28; {2,4} valid on n300-llmbox, 8 invalid (28/8 non-integer)
